use_cases: Compose and schedule social media posts with date and time selection
Create draft content with built-in scheduling calendar dropdown
Manage queued posts for content marketing campaigns
ai_summary: A social media post composer component with an integrated scheduling calendar dropdown. Features a textarea for composing content and an animated date/time picker for scheduling posts. Uses Framer Motion for smooth entrance/exit animations. Clean minimalist design with generous border-radius and subtle borders, suitable for content management dashboards and social media tools.
